---
title: Prepare for March 24 lecture
---

<br>

📖 Proofs from Thursday's lecture and the coming lecture can be found [here](pdfs/ScalableGP_proof.pdf).

📖 Read Sections 4-6 of [Practical Hilbert space approximate Bayesian Gaussian processes for probabilistic programming](pdfs/riutort-mayol-2020.pdf) by Riutort-Mayol et al. 2022. **You don’t need to fully understand everything in the paper!**

✅ Work on [HW 04](https://biostat725-sp26.netlify.app/hw/hw-04) which is due before class!
